title: Actinella tweediei
taxonomy: Actinella tweediei is a species of lichen that belongs to the family Physciaceae. It is a type of crustose lichen, which means it grows as a crust on rocks, trees, or other surfaces. The classification of Actinella tweediei can be broken down as follows: kingdom Fungi, phylum Ascomycota, class Lecanoromycetes, order Caliciales, family Physciaceae, genus Actinella. The specific classification of Actinella tweediei is based on its morphological characteristics and genetic relationships to other lichens. Further research may be necessary to confirm its exact classification.
